entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop discussed in the context of seed supply and production in India

entities.name: SEED
entities.description: A basic input essential for enhancing the productivity of crop species

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output for crop species

entities.name: IMPROVED CULTIVAR
entities.description: Quality seed varieties that serve as the foundation for food production security

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring stable and sufficient food production

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climatic condition of the region, specifically in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the seed requirement goals were perceived

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers with limited land and resources who require quality seeds

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of crop varieties to withstand environmental stresses

entities.name: OPEN POLLINATED VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties that are pollinated by open means, often preferred by smallholders but avoided by the private sector

entities.name: PRIVATE SEED SECTOR
entities.description: Commercial entities involved in the production and marketing of seeds

entities.name: REMOTE RURAL AREAS
entities.description: Geographically isolated regions where seed access is difficult for small farmers

entities.name: SEED SUPPLY SYSTEM
entities.description: The network and process of providing seeds to farmers

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The characteristic of producing a large amount of crop per unit area

entities.name: STORAGE FACILITIES
entities.description: Infrastructure used to store seeds to maintain quality and prevent loss

entities.name: POD BORER
entities.description: A storage pest that affects the quality of groundnut seeds

entities.name: SAVED SEED
entities.description: Seeds collected and stored by farmers from their own harvest for the next season

entities.name: VILLAGE SEED BANKS
entities.description: Community-managed seed storage and distribution systems

entities.name: INTEGRATED SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: A comprehensive system combining various seed sources to improve access and supply
